name: dynatrace-mcp-server
description: Access Dynatrace observability data: logs, metrics, problems, vulnerabilities via DQL and Dynatrace Intelligence
long_description: The Dynatrace MCP Server connects Claude to your Dynatrace observability platform, enabling real-time access to logs, metrics, problems, vulnerabilities, traces, and more — directly from your AI assistant. Supports DQL queries, Dynatrace Intelligence, workflow automation, and document management.

tools.name: get_environment_info
tools.description: Get information about the connected Dynatrace Environment and verify connection/authentication.

tools.name: list_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Retrieve active vulnerabilities from Dynatrace with optional filters.

tools.name: list_problems
tools.description: List problems in Dynatrace with status and timeframe filters.

tools.name: find_entity_by_name
tools.description: Find monitored Dynatrace entities by name and return entity IDs/types.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Send a Slack message through Dynatrace Slack Connector.

tools.name: verify_dql
tools.description: Syntactically verify a DQL query before execution.

tools.name: execute_dql
tools.description: Execute DQL and retrieve logs, metrics, events, spans, and entity data.

tools.name: generate_dql_from_natural_language
tools.description: Generate DQL statements from natural language using Dynatrace Intelligence.

tools.name: explain_dql_in_natural_language
tools.description: Explain DQL statements in natural language using Dynatrace Intelligence.

tools.name: chat_with_davis_copilot
tools.description: Ask general Dynatrace questions using Dynatrace Intelligence.

tools.name: create_workflow_for_notification
tools.description: Create a Dynatrace workflow for problem notifications.

tools.name: make_workflow_public
tools.description: Update a workflow and make it publicly accessible in the Dynatrace environment.

tools.name: get_kubernetes_events
tools.description: Retrieve Kubernetes events from Dynatrace for a cluster and timeframe.

tools.name: reset_grail_budget
tools.description: Reset the local Grail query budget tracker for the current MCP session.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send email through the Dynatrace Email API.

tools.name: send_event
tools.description: Send custom events to Dynatrace using Events API v2.

tools.name: list_exceptions
tools.description: List recent exceptions known to Dynatrace.

tools.name: list_davis_analyzers
tools.description: List available Davis analyzers.

tools.name: execute_davis_analyzer
tools.description: Execute a Davis analyzer with custom input.

tools.name: create_dynatrace_notebook
tools.description: Create a Dynatrace notebook document for sharing findings.

dt_environment.title: Dynatrace Environment URL
dt_environment.description: URL to your Dynatrace Platform (e.g. https://abc12345.apps.dynatrace.com). Do not use Dynatrace classic URLs.

dt_platform_token.title: [OPTIONAL] Dynatrace Platform Token
dt_platform_token.description: Dynatrace Platform Token for authentication. Alternative to browser-based OAuth authentication.

oauth_client_id.title: [OPTIONAL] OAuth Client ID
oauth_client_id.description: OAuth Client ID for advanced authentication scenarios. Use together with OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.

oauth_client_secret.title: [OPTIONAL] OAuth Client Secret
oauth_client_secret.description: OAuth Client Secret for advanced authentication scenarios. Use together with OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.

dt_grail_query_budget_gb.title: Grail Query Budget (GB)
dt_grail_query_budget_gb.description: Budget limit in GB for Grail query bytes scanned per session. Default: 1000. Set to -1 to disable.

dt_mcp_disable_telemetry.title: Disable Telemetry
dt_mcp_disable_telemetry.description: Disable usage telemetry events sent by the MCP server.
